description: Blind-baseline-first prompt cases for Phase 116 code quality and self-review chat quality.

cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated logic or repeated code-quality risks around stealth order lookup and reveal state handling. Read only. Return findings with severity, evidence refs, impact, and bounded remediation options.

In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, review business/order_event_stream.py for excessive complexity, broad exception handling, or maintainability risks. Read only. Return only evidence-backed code-quality findings and note any false positives you reject.

In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, review service/orders.py for naming clarity, function boundaries, and simple code-quality issues. Read only. If no meaningful issue is supported, say that and explain why.

In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, review service/api.py and service/orders.py for tight coupling between request handling and business logic. Read only. Return findings, evidence refs, and any rejected false positives.

In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, self-review this proposed patch before implementation: in service/api.py, change `paid = bool(message.get("paid", False))` to `paid = message.get("paid") == True`. Read only. Identify correctness, maintainability, naming/style, and test risks with evidence refs and a recommendation.

In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, review service/orders.py specifically for duplicated logic. Read only. Do not invent issues; if duplication is not supported, return no finding with evidence.

In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for code-quality issues related to magic strings, enum usage, and single-code-path maintainability. Read only. Return evidence-backed findings and rejected assumptions.

In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, create a self-review checklist for a planned change that adds a requirement note to the stealth order lookup answer. Read only. Include coding standards, tests, evidence refs to inspect, risks, and explicit non-goals.

In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated stealth-order lookup logic. Read only. Return at most three evidence-backed findings and say when evidence is insufficient.

In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, self-review this proposed patch before implementation: in service/orders.py, remove the `if item_count <= 0: return "empty"` branch from resolve_order_status. Read only. Identify correctness, edge-case, test, and maintainability risks.
